creator: toxic@doobie.com
text:
I contributed archivers/libpar2 to the ports tree.  I also maintain news/nzbget, and will likely start picking up additional ports that have been abandoned by their maintainers.

It's my understanding that I should be listed in the Additional Contributors section of the documentation and web site.  If that's true, please add me.  If that's not true, then please kindly correct me (and either I or someone else should make that more clear in the Porter's Handbook)

A patch to doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributors/contrib.additional.sgml is attached.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
